textByHashes.f0fe7d012744aff33701c9e460af7b31362b16af: Enter the Theatre and beat the challenges within. Doing so would cause great embarrasment to Verzik, and my associates would very much appreciate it.
textByHashes.5b2216b07783a06ea940fcfba6b898a9e6effced: My associates prefer to keep their intentions to themselves. However, if you were to assist us with another matter, I might be able to share more.
textByHashes.691421966bd24455ff0432e18a9f07e58a72b7ce: Your suspicions are correct. My role here is not to embarrass Verzik Vitur. Instead, my associates have a long history with Verzik, and have sent me here to keep an eye on her.
textByHashes.77d4113f5f6929a3dd09f264042e329eab4ddaad: Yes. As you're aware, of all those that go into the Theatre, the vast majority never come out. That said, some have managed to succeed. Of course, the vampyres would never let the citizens know this.
textByHashes.3f31e11d47435af1f640f44f4ac2e9534d11d355: Thanks to these successes, I've been able to gather information on Verzik and her abilities.
textByHashes.4845be7ecfa840058772446a104b2cf19cc62617: Verzik has abilities unlike any other vampyre. However, she did not always possess these abilities. My associates are keen to discover how she obtained them.
textByHashes.131418c48b5c29b2b6a04fe4871609dc6e59a491: These were recently recovered from within the Theatre. Take a look at them.
textByHashes.b3ffd5d31b6cec98351332ecd38fe52082dcb7d5: Not just any eggs. These are the eggs of a nylocas, one of Verzik's arachnid pets.
textByHashes.6a2feb67fc2767b5376d3b58fdb1eab557500864: Normally this wouldn't be anything special. After all, Verzik has hundreds of nylocas. However, these eggs are from a variant we've never encountered before.
textByHashes.cf36fcdb890db4295c7dbf671755d75388e32e10: What's more interesting than that though is how they were obtained. For lack of a better description, the mercenary who recovered them claimed they 'fell out' of Verzik herself.
textByHashes.5c11288af3d75028a771798734c99447a2e2a7c4: It would line up with some suspicions my associates have had for a while.
textByHashes.20efd4b9eec64292099f62f4f49e5500bf744687: That is correct. I also believe you have a friend who can help.
textByHashes.a17f9c992af8c09ca7c4f085a0e151c41f9b0ac6: My kind have the ability to relive our memories as if they are happening again. We can also relive the memories of others if we are able to make physical contact with them. I could show you if you want?
textByHashes.7a813b75a772585b76b31599f2f317c07119f044: I am not at liberty to say.
textByHashes.216dec537b1303d07adc95fb9d77cbb86d0411a4: We are lucky that vampyre corpses deteriorate slower than many other species. Enough of his brain should still be intact for me to work with.
textByHashes.30e019aa3d0fe6e4c40c41b27c3d38e3b6a4a9bb: Ranis and Verzik were close friends. He interacted with her more than anyone else did. Getting close enough to Verzik to observe her own memories will be... problematic. He is the next best option.
textByHashes.53644ae828dafffc698734fc2220e1869819848b: Within his memories we can hopefully learn more about Verzik and her abilities. As for the eggs, they are our catalyst.
textByHashes.a64fb4e298276ea6b4200cef627bf0af88a6345d: It would take years to search through all of Ranis' mind, but I can use these eggs to help us find relevant memories much faster.
textByHashes.d5cbe81985ed4a0d9016e489cdea3a80f69d91d6: Now, I must remain here. That means you will need to recover Ranis for us.
textByHashes.9af04bc1affe4219c43d680b607a3d756af852a3: Luckily for us, Ranis always loved the Theatre. As such, he is actually buried deep below it. You can use the staircase to the north east to access his crypt.
textByHashes.da3015720d565c53b91713df84bb4663a511e381: Be careful, it's well guarded. Even other vampyres are not allowed in. I suggest you take that flail of yours.
textByHashes.339d74ae2b0e5657c038b141adfb11f0425f20fa: Also, you don't need to bring his whole body back of course. That wouldn't be very subtle. We only need his brain.
textByHashes.1afd914958574adcc6614f78558ffe89d466fb3d: I know. That's why I'd recommend you take a saw.
textByHashes.82704a329cfe988d0f1065e600081d044cf39d95: As you wish. Return to me if you change your mind.
textByHashes.fb27b028f14a46cebfb68d4c92636af4b22bb54f: Return to me when that changes.
textByHashes.3ecf551aeef75ff4b2c0e9f60532b0719cb861ed: Very impressive. I had a feeling you would have what it takes.
textByHashes.e50c8f33646519450420247a0292cd08577ba848: Verzik will be back soon enough. Death will not come easy for her. However, you have still been of great use to my associates.
textByHashes.7819c2d70da2c954f1b262d687d099408ecb0fd6: You again. Interested in heading back into the Theatre?
textByHashes.2c9c744cfe31cfe1957bfe66b2a969a7e22e51a1: You again. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.24dfc07f727695104ce81cd14fba06fa1bb17869: You can use the staircase to the north east to access his crypt. Remember, you don't need to bring his whole body back. We only need his brain. I'd recommend you take a saw.
textByHashes.b78dd95449ac9bd20887308d249ee74d479f67ba: You should probably go and find it again then.
textByHashes.7c4becda2076d67d574c2b2ee9587b73e5f0d20b: Hmm... Yes, I think this will work.
textByHashes.bba797d0430bc72b8f175919a9bb3e1c3c1dca81: It seems that Ranis has many memories of these eggs, or at least of something very similar. Thanks to my abilities, we can view these memories. Hopefully they will reveal the truth about Verzik.
textByHashes.4822040b5d2a174188ae9dc56b86321d72a56897: Now, I suggest we start at the beginning. Take my hand.
textByHashes.ec443b3a5fafbfc13f0b71fceb0bc3172a5ed90e: I require physical contact to share the memory with you.
textByHashes.d20e3380122334891370aebf6f7f12c17d433867: It was. However, the memory was from many years ago, before she gained her unique abilities.
textByHashes.43830a2f95e13e996c2a4040259ed04ce6d7f8e1: The eggs in that memory were very similar to the ones in my possession, but they were not identical. It sounded like Verzik intended to use them to breed new nylocas.
textByHashes.c81056fc45e44d00deef3ae764c87db18f94ce91: And perhaps it was also the starting point for Verzik's abilities.
textByHashes.ff599e830ea6da8712f83318d05db2ad03a1d108: We will need to recover some of those eggs for ourselves. With them, we may be able to find further relevant memories.
textByHashes.91ce32363f7ff17f77c992acb37dce453ee4adbf: Good idea. I will remain here.
textByHashes.ff3000e548c9d1189d999f593e427375329dae86: My associates would prefer I remain here.
textByHashes.1ad3f5f1abfba2f0461bad5f0ab5e0ce271fd142: It's supposedly just north of Darkmeyer. Go there and see if you can find any eggs matching the ones Ranis gave to Verzik.
textByHashes.64860ad84aef4acca7d1c7cd5350a8d60b5f410b: Excellent. Let's have a look at them.
textByHashes.d0682995a8c21734209225869c6460efbc2e43e7: Well I'll need you to bring them here. They could be key to understanding Verzik's abilities.
textByHashes.e2561e288672ca1379476682446e899fdee2e5fd: I believe I can use these new eggs to help us find more memories of note. Hopefully they will start to present a clearer picture for us.
textByHashes.5961ccaddc33a74855ccb6db638c0bb57b59bbd3: Once we're done, I'll also have the eggs sent to my associates. Assuming they do have a connection to Verzik's abilities, they will come in very useful.
textByHashes.86e73af459c0dc45d9090fbbf3d2c898f8920108: Oh quite the opposite. Their hope is to find a way to counteract them.
textByHashes.a66b73cad6960a5159829b92fde7286b045ac960: Anyway, I think I have found a new memory for us.
textByHashes.1fbbefa7eeeb9a81ab818573cd65838bb7463f2b: So Verzik did manage to use those eggs to create new nylocas. However, something is still missing.
textByHashes.beb1c75f2cbfa088f0312d04b896a34e8633ee9c: Yes, I believe there is. Let us see what it can tell us.
textByHashes.714c326de12d3f81a2271f4118318aa578241078: They are remarkable plants with a will of their own. Not to mention their many unique properties...
textByHashes.475b25130651cd7b0c59ff0cc2eab35cc003a039: They were grown here back when this place was still known as Hallowvale. The Saradominist Queen of the region used them as weapons against the vampyres.
textByHashes.9570f46c2d36c5110e262c6d9a41bf4871c413d5: It sounds like the vampyres found multiple uses for the hespori. Not only did they play a part in the creation of the Maiden of Sugadinti, but they were also potentially used to make a new nylocas.
textByHashes.fe9f17e7337705eedddbaf605c31d2d22ce9d9f7: You are correct. However, I'd suggest you collect some from a naturally occuring hespori rather than one you've grown yourself.
textByHashes.60b5932537d02d3aeee57d4308a25d0ad6feba6e: They are native to Morytania, but they are quite rare. I'm afraid I'm not an expert on nature.
textByHashes.469c639c17813a4a6d2396051af2308d52745cf4: Perfect. I will await your return.
textByHashes.da1e9cd62fffdb58e1b7c812012c02a34e09cb73: It seems Verzik did manage to use those eggs to create new nylocas. However, something is still missing.
textByHashes.583a139aa3b4142d30ff9630763c1358ad836365: Indeed. It seems a hespori is key to our next steps.
textByHashes.67110a9e1cf7cbbffee368e1dc557bc428e29659: I'm not sure. They are native to Morytania, but they are quite rare. You mentioned a nature spirit who could help.
textByHashes.a8dbba054388813fa194b7d755d344ff8d1b5843: Then you should go and speak to him. I will await your return.
textByHashes.5e40853e9ff86bc32e17ebff42b5e00d205773ba: Perfect. Do you have some bark from it?
textByHashes.a051ceec1c42dc2009344532f2f587daa945c2c9: Then you should go and recover some. Be careful, for it will likely fight back. I will await your return.
textByHashes.f9b56dc9d4dd4eabad9577fb8e629abf2359c6bb: Excellent. This is just what we needed.
textByHashes.0cf34a806012457b0d55776655b142359e5642f4: Yes, I think so. Let me see what I can find...
textByHashes.f9ed46041df989fc1854343fd1c3822fa7398e82: Ah, here we go. I believe we're getting close now.
textByHashes.96b7f8cec464d0dff892d9bc8c59a8a1f25ad1d9: Interesting, but not overly illuminating. Still, we are not far off now.
textByHashes.163a0fec208a741b3411b1cab2917abdf6dbadb4: There is one final memory. Let us hope it provides the answers we seek.
textByHashes.13328c8da1ed7260de1cc7c9abf3ac893e171d54: We have still gained a lot here. That bite almost certainly led to her abilities, and we know how the nylocas variant responsible was created.
textByHashes.17923fff8020f0f8f7582b9a92739d247637ccb3: We even have the relevant materials as well. Between them and the knowledge we now have, my associates should be able to begin work on new weapons and techniques to use against Verzik.
textByHashes.20d24874738461b20b17778bcfb9209315010c53: I admit, while hopefully not essential, clarity on what happened next would be very useful. However, Ranis has no further memories of use to us. There's likely to only be one place to find the truth now.
textByHashes.afd676500fac004a193b923d88a8f50cc59c7eed: Correct. But for me to gain access to Verzik's memories, I'd need to make physical contact with her. That would require us to enter the Theatre, something I was quite keen to avoid.
textByHashes.254146fca3908aad3a0e7b6bf837029178006d5d: True, but I am no fighter. However...
textByHashes.3765ad9f06564760bc4c4264018db273601eb5c5: I know that there have been times when groups have entered the Theatre and had members not actually participate in the challenges.
textByHashes.036713f82b71e2224eee4d207607cc2be7f6b959: Provided the more able members of the group succeed, these individuals are still considered to have beaten the challenge.
textByHashes.20dd80f8ec0f325c5d6bef4997db22d81cad3d90: That is an apt way of putting it. If you can get me to Verzik, I should hopefully be able to extract the memories we need. The moment of defeat will be my best opportunity, when she is weakest.
textByHashes.620640477203a14eced29ad915b4f5fb5dc974d3: You can still take other people in as well of course. Just use the notice board to set up a party and find suitable allies. Once you're ready, I will join you in the Theatre.
textByHashes.b2a253a1065b7010d2a069d61eca5468b968b56e: I am. Remember, you need to get me all the way to Verzik herself and then defeat her. When she is at her weakest, I should be able able to extract the memories we need.
textByHashes.53afa844a500bc966262d71e4ecf0896901c757c: Don't forget you can use the notice board to find suitable allies to join us if you don't feel comfortable doing this alone. I will join you inside once you are ready.
textByHashes.9be1b6cb610da6d7c8bbb866e646f357b2866449: You fought well. Now, let us move on. We have to reach Verzik so that I can extract her memories.
textByHashes.14ead237df56636f8d6e37f3fff465870a51ce54: The Maiden of Sugadinti. Such an ironic name.
textByHashes.21aa1078347442f7f47e34184ac7823afe0f995d: Not much more than you probably know yourself. Hers is a tragic tale of misguided hope.
textByHashes.4c104e5f71f09b081fdca33c84c0e0d1a4d81151: You might find it useful to know that she's a powerful user of magic. Unsurprisingly, blood magic is her specialism. I hear she also has a habit of using nylocas to further increase her power.
textByHashes.9bcfbe27051f3a464568623430bdc3b3b8e8ef4f: The Pestilent Bloat. What a disgusting monstrosity.
textByHashes.6cb364045f75892a9a5410b04240c418e8a17250: Nothing fancier than some crude necromancy. Still, that doesn't mean it's not dangerous. Don't even try to take it head on. Wait for the perfect moment and attack while it is weak.
textByHashes.9f89f1838d4ac516a9ee2fdef6e21a371a5bb22d: Some types. Alone they're not overly dangerous, but you'll never encounter them alone. Their power is in numbers.
textByHashes.82e57bd46b4828b45e3247a97d8279f20b85c575: Different variants have different weaknesses. Prioritise your targets, and ensure you use the right weaponry against them.
textByHashes.6dbaa048a5367a4c76807ce24a304123630c7ea5: Sotetseg. One of the greater mysteries of this Theatre.
textByHashes.99b47190205bc066d68ec4377eaa468884ce7c43: He's some sort of modified dark beast. No dark beasts have ever been encountered in Morytania, so who knows how the vampyres got him here. Perhaps he is not of this world at all...
textByHashes.b612e41f368c994230442eeeb5674bddd06eb6b0: Be careful, for he has a strong affinity with the shadow realm. He will almost certainly use it against you. Expect the unexpected.
textByHashes.a479b33331d2f12edabf8979645148460fd48f1c: Yes. Survivors of the Theatre have spoken of some sort of strange shadowy maze.
textByHashes.d3f713d49b0ceb200362b3ca5ae7f0cb77f34567: The once great King of the yarasa. This prison is such a sad end for Xarpus.
textByHashes.29a2d072e2cb6d10f099667888dc7e0afb4270f9: Death would be preferable to a life of imprisonment. The Theatre is a testament to that.
textByHashes.a24817236a4b76628bb0df023c223ce3be636b8e: Anyway, we are close now. Defeat Xarpus, and the path to Verzik is clear.
textByHashes.d9d3b5bda1622a8eab093b71385c6b4462bf5722: He will attempt to power himself up before he fights. Try and stop that where you can. Once the fight begins, be careful of his highly poisonous attacks.
textByHashes.18fbe1843b88692229c57469b1fd25c4d902dbc2: You fought well. Now, only Verzik awaits. Remember, you must fully defeat her for me to have a chance to extract her memories. Let us proceed once you are ready.
textByHashes.b05265585b4888f217d2f4df6a70774547e8173d: Yes and no. I have a memory that I believe has answers for us. However, it is not Verzik's memory.
textByHashes.9bacc6f1acce1b08e623f0b2d879bf793c6ad686: I think it's best if I just show you.
textByHashes.8f53892053cbb556ab6a073bac1e464fea72fff0: We feared the worst, but we never anticipated something like this.
textByHashes.6297b06fe3f321579e2146e820018bbc12d6fd70: ...is really just that nylocas in disguise. We must inform my master at once.
textByHashes.269e11bc99c4185b6d472f120ced7c33bf64422f: They do not. My master preferred that I keep his involvement a secret, but I feel you are now trusted enough to meet him.
textByHashes.5b73e829f71a4bc1328326292af638810de23032: In a similar way to how my kind can relive our memories, we can also communicate across great distances.
textByHashes.a2eaa5a6cbb8591b052bb603e4cde85cc7523a35: Another of my kind is with my master. Through the two of us, you will be able to speak with him.
textByHashes.96cb63df16bc9a6a21cca6e8aa9614c51ee5a819: It can take some getting used to. Now, I will contact my master and inform him of what we have discovered. Once I am done, I expect he will want to speak with you.
textByHashes.bbb074283e5b68d697ebbd5b3ac6f5ef2e75912b: There. Now, when I next speak, it will be my voice you hear. However, the words are from my master.
textByHashes.7fd30f5dc18c6b1422501352e712cf6e11ac8e03: You again. My master is very impressed with your work. On his behalf, allow me to reward you.
textByHashes.44c5ec2b2d07eac9db493651b7533f09b52152da: I wouldn't advise going down there before you know the risks, adventurer.
textByHashes.e02a6af0c1100b3e73f46eb17ae111c14ecc5cd0: Welcome adventurer, to the Hallowed Sepulchre. Are you here to claim some of the treasure within? It seems like the kind of activity one like you would appreciate.
textByHashes.4ce0e55fac242dccef79ddfb66eff0cf9323ada8: I mean you're not one of the inhabitants of this city. We could use someone of your talents.
textByHashes.4c567bba2a33e9ddeadca7e7bc240c9e439c9d78: I mean you're not one of the inhabitants of this city... although you do smell and look like one. We could use someone of your talents.
textByHashes.afacc0a8fe6ea26021e46e1c9221f7266451cbba: This place was built long before the city of Darkmeyer existed, back when this land was known as Hallowvale.
textByHashes.a2e2f17de916338500b6001bccd442340635326a: The Sepulchre was used as a resting place for Hallowvale's loyal followers of Saradomin.
textByHashes.2e88af6fcbb8a166fa432f0ad59712c9a1508bce: Before they were driven out by the vampyres, the Saradominists used their magic to safeguard this place.
textByHashes.627da1d98932ed46267b9f21f161641ad5c7c1d7: The dead here were buried with the wealth they had in life. To protect these riches, the Saradominists enchanted the statues within the Sepulchre to create various defences.
textByHashes.8a1b509514f45f7dcc2a13d064c845702564c180: Many have tried and failed to obtain the prizes buried here.
textByHashes.e7ac78a963bb4c3b4a361c67e5dfaa08b8b6bee6: We don't care for a lot of what is kept here. We are only interested in the old currency of this land.
textByHashes.066ef2f346d05cf968c853181638ed43c6f81c46: If you find any of these Hallowed marks, I'd be willing to take them off your hands. In exchange, I can provide tools that can help you within the Hallowed Sepulchre.
textByHashes.c51494e1d1227334a2beaf37eaf860634dbf38f7: You can keep whatever else you find for yourself.
textByHashes.9566bf4eef5959e57f30ea8e0862440ca13bc091: You should know, only the most agile of adventurers will have success down there. You'll need to use your reflexes to overcome the traps within.
textByHashes.fa99bbf84f965a0908bf45126392e25721232713: The Sepulchre has five floors in total, each more dangerous than the last. I hope you prove competent enough to make it all the way down.
textByHashes.c57b153288ec65ddcf9cb3d8e72c1f2f65fb239c: The statues have been enchanted to shoot fire, lightning and arrows. Some also throw swords. There are also tiles that when stepped on, will teleport you somewhere else.
textByHashes.b4713ac0adc1e611956e866115e9c37575badb53: Yes... It seems that there is another safeguard which prevents anyone from spending too long within the Sepulchre.
textByHashes.368f311cceee489ae0637bb67af81f9b58858a77: You'll only have so much time before the magic within seals both the coffins and the stairs leading to the next floor.
textByHashes.c6a4addff56504c9682fa90fed95a29164558259: The priests who built this place had a teleportation system. The magical obelisks they used can be found at the end of each floor. These obelisks can be used to transport you back here.
textByHashes.bd6660ba1b59e08a4ae9d4595417e379baf0129d: However, we have found that the obelisks only respond to those they perceive to be followers of Saradomin. I'd strongly advise against wearing items of any other god.
textByHashes.74e2d92733752fc7a4edd902abb433617a1e8715: I see you are cautious adventurer. That is wise. You can use any teleport spell to escape from the Hallowed Sepulchre. However, you may also find these of use.
textByHashes.d4da68112c027b3f945e1e9efafb9d62cf72ae8b: These teleport crystals were enchanted using the magic of the obelisks. They can be used to teleport to this lobby. I can sell you more when you run out.
textByHashes.c3eff981cc08840708738b9c91c2c9068ef8831b: Like you, I am not from here. I represent a group who are very interested in the Hallowed marks found within the Hallowed Sepulchre.
textByHashes.8c9572466c2fff2c224196d3cce667ef25adfff1: So you're the one who the master spoke of. I am aware of your contributions. Helping us out here will earn yourself further favour with him.
textByHashes.dcd2a8e1a0c2e40244814b25a89fecb145df0133: That is for you to decide. I have told you all that I have to share.
textByHashes.43c1cfa91c3dff6e680a913737f1ba4ff7d882e1: That is all you need to know.
textByHashes.e662b07bd95e98e509e1171c4de22f70814fec83: I do not. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.
textByHashes.1e68274d442611fc38eecef0139f5112ff2ba46b: I do have some of your items here. Try not to get hit by the traps next time.
textByHashes.8b3666f1b8bc7e2c073f5114b590f9ea8accc7a4: An interesting problem. But... I suppose I could grant you private access to the Hallowed Sepulchre... for a fee.
textByHashes.9cd3e04637c5150e25166d1634287e4561c9a8f4: Then I'm afraid that, for now, you will have to contend with your peers activating traps for you.
textByHashes.37badabfa543a2fa71e69aaee80b9262c13ff787: Very well. You should now find that when you enter the Hallowed Sepulchre, you will end up in different chambers to your peers.
textByHashes.a3f995fca825fd9378fc4adde30ba4ffc3f1e999: Speak to me again if you like this effect rescinded.
textByHashes.3d4798787c7b537b433d8cdf381e967ca878b632: Very well. I shall be here if you change your mind.
textByHashes.1755145933ad357cceeaad83e7cff0ef8a16b498: I see you're still alive adventurer. Do you have any Hallowed marks for me?
textByHashes.e35ff13a2b2586da73da463c6eb03d6df6866eed: Is there anything else you need?
textByHashes.c0f1c9b8037daf21b5e1b38d60d127b01b00731e: I can remove your private access for now, if you're sure.
textByHashes.254df3eb28c85cf1882c2bcdaafaa73b83340d83: Very well. You should now find that when you enter the Hallowed Sepulchre, your peers will join you.
textByHashes.eca4643c0d57be72cf129e1d69a04b2961e3a758: Speak to me again if you would like this effect restored.
textByHashes.83ad4a20eabd3d7a1d05acd042ab14b405fea543: I can restore your private access for you, if you're sure.
textByHashes.29b86382e8e0f737ff0d6abbace06b35261f50ca: I do not have anything for you. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.
textByHashes.851e5275f9dcb83f03c7d70af97d9d33814975e4: I have some of your things. You should come get them before you enter the Hallowed Sepulchre.
textByHashes.abd87cf38cfcb843a25ab0f1e6f1ab2cc729218e: You look like someone who can handle themselves. Are you intending to partake in the Theatre of Blood?
textByHashes.ebceb29359f595f26a7cf139130cbc894656e012: You're wondering what's in it for you I suppose. The citizens of Meiyerditch come here looking for freedom, but I can tell you're no citizen.
textByHashes.54139ffe102b6c4dccd2faf9c108541d2a347ef9: Don't worry, you're not the first to sneak in. The guards here turn a blind eye to that sort of thing. Outsiders generally perform better in the Theatre, so make for more interesting entertainment.
textByHashes.ec0c923b17e0f76287d545efbcb1d0673acfffb9: You're strong enough to survive the Theatre, but you need a reason to try. I have a little proposition for you.
textByHashes.f17722fbc9c272fbd5a1b307bad44d35010b796e: The Theatre is owned by Lady Verzik Vitur, a vampyre noble. I represent a party that has certain... interests in Verzik.
textByHashes.249b76e6b0f4aaa299c75bf2810e3dc5b8797fba: Enter the Theatre and beat the challenges within. Doing so would be quite the embarrassment for Verzik, something that my associates would very much appreciate.
textByHashes.fa54a73c79de733f635664f814c4e793f9eb8480: Be aware, this will be no easy challenge. While you may well succeed alone, the guards will let you enter in a group of up to five. I suggest you take advantage of this.
textByHashes.6548119be5b5323cca7acefa534ea89fd5fed24b: You can use the notice board to find suitable allies with whom to enter the Theatre.
textByHashes.60ad55b59acb8b3d498ed1d4edebc00dcbd917b5: Actually, I do. Verzik's magic prevents most forms of teleportation. However, there is a special crystal with the power to overcome this restriction.
textByHashes.493d623883a6465ba9c603a0a5976d56a8da5242: I have... acquired some shards of the crystal. Do not ask me how. If you take one into the Theatre, you can use it to teleport to safety in an emergency.
textByHashes.15ac5d91b23ac45dfb51fc9f62814bdfda500fab: Of course. It will cost you though.
textByHashes.eb808758abb1c5c1c39fd28bdefcc9bf0e40cfed: You again. My master is very impressed with your work. I have something for you, if you desire.
textByHashes.2438b55909e039b5b87a934e7699ffe781a5a4d5: You may choose which reward you desire.
textByHashes.55f9ce4f232198d377ed5760aff87c82cefa5967: Which memory would you like to see?
textByHashes.7f3e63746507705dc566ab2b610a5ef780ef263d: You should be careful around here friend. If I can tell you don't belong here, they probably can as well.
